name: TCIL_AssignReceiver
title: TCIL_AssignReceiver
syntax: long TCIL_AssignReceiver(dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source) // form 1
description: The functions sends an Assign Receiver message to the setpoint value user device.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: This DDI and the element number specify the setpoint value user.
